# FOR — Content form mechanics

Genus: **Forma**

Whether the format-specific mechanics fit the video form.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H035 | *Forma pulsus* var. h035-side-side-comparisons | E. Visual rhythm and editing | Side-by-side comparisons outperform sequential examples. | RET | M-FRM |
| H038 | *Forma pulsus* var. h038-polished-style-beats | E. Visual rhythm and editing | Polished style beats lo-fi when credibility is the value proposition. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H093 | *Forma formalis* var. h093-clear-watch-signal | Attention scarcity | Videos with a clear why-watch-this signal in the first second outperform visually attractive but semantically vague videos. | CTV | M-FRM |
| H132 | *Forma formalis* var. h132-complexity-tutorials-outperform | Diffusion adoptability | Lower-complexity tutorials outperform complex frameworks for short-form feeds. | RET | M-FRM |
| H135 | *Forma storyformis* var. h135-teardowns-frameworks-spread | Opinion leaders | Teardowns and frameworks spread better among opinion leaders than generic tips. | SND | M-FRM |
| H145 | *Forma formalis* var. h145-category-consistent-pattern | Distinctiveness | Category-consistent pattern interruption beats random weirdness. | CTV | M-FRM |
| H166 | *Forma facialis* var. h166-early-face-plus | Talking head | Early face plus proof inserts beats uninterrupted face-only delivery for educational videos. | EHR | M-FRM |
| H167 | *Forma facialis* var. h167-talking-head-retain | Talking head | Talking-head videos retain better when the first sentence names a specific viewer problem rather than a topic category. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H168 | *Forma facialis* var. h168-direct-contact-improves | Talking head | Direct eye contact improves trust, but too much static framing lowers completion on practical content. | RET | M-FRM |
| H169 | *Forma actionalis* var. h169-tutorials-save-final | Tutorial / how-to | Tutorials save better when the final state is shown before the steps. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H170 | *Forma textualis* var. h170-step-labels-improve | Tutorial / how-to | Step labels improve completion in tutorials with more than two steps. | RET | M-FRM |
| H171 | *Forma formalis* var. h171-tutorials-visible-mistake | Tutorial / how-to | Tutorials with one visible mistake and one fix outperform general tip lists. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H172 | *Forma formalis* var. h172-zoomed-screen-recordings | Screen recording / software | Zoomed screen recordings retain better than full-screen recordings on mobile. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H173 | *Forma textualis* var. h173-cursor-highlight-annotations | Screen recording / software | Cursor/highlight annotations increase saves when UI targets are small. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H174 | *Forma textualis* var. h174-screen-tutorials-need | Screen recording / software | Screen tutorials need a verbal or text promise in the first 2 seconds because UI alone is often visually ambiguous. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H181 | *Forma storyformis* var. h181-comedy-clips-need | Skit / comedy | Comedy clips need the premise within the first second, not after character setup. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H184 | *Forma actionalis* var. h184-reaction-perform-added | Meme / remix / reaction | Reaction videos perform better when the added commentary changes the meaning, not just repeats the source clip. | CMT | M-FRM |
| H185 | *Forma textualis* var. h185-memes-niche-labels | Meme / remix / reaction | Memes with niche labels increase sends inside that group but may narrow total reach. | SND | M-FRM |
| H186 | *Forma storyformis* var. h186-remixes-need-payoff | Meme / remix / reaction | Remixes need a new payoff within 3 seconds to avoid feeling like recycled content. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H187 | *Forma storyformis* var. h187-product-demos-convert | Product demo / unboxing | Product demos convert better when the problem is shown before the product. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H194 | *Forma formalis* var. h194-clips-live-perform | Livestream clip | Clips from live Q&A perform better when the viewer question is shown first. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H202 | *Forma primafacialis* var. h202-recipes-stop-scroll | Food / recipe | Recipes stop scroll better when the finished dish is shown first. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H203 | *Forma textualis* var. h203-recipe-save-ingredient | Food / recipe | Recipe videos save better when ingredient amounts appear as persistent text. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H204 | *Forma textualis* var. h204-texture-sound-close | Food / recipe | Texture/sound close-ups increase retention for food videos when used before instruction. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H205 | *Forma storyformis* var. h205-beauty-fashion-benefit | Beauty / fashion | Beauty/fashion videos benefit from immediate before/after contrast rather than product intro. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H206 | *Forma textualis* var. h206-shade-save-labels | Beauty / fashion | Shade/fit videos save better when labels stay visible long enough to screenshot. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H207 | *Forma actionalis* var. h207-outfit-beauty-send | Beauty / fashion | Outfit/beauty videos send better when the use case is socially specific. | SND | M-FRM |
| H208 | *Forma actionalis* var. h208-commentary-retains-information | News / commentary | Commentary retains better when the new information is stated before opinion. | CMT | M-FRM |
| H209 | *Forma actionalis* var. h209-explainer-clips-save | News / commentary | Explainer clips save better when they include a timeline or causal chain. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H210 | *Forma probatoria* var. h210-take-commentary-gets | News / commentary | Hot-take commentary gets more comments but weaker trust if no source/proof is shown. | CMT | M-FRM |
| H211 | *Forma storyformis* var. h211-storytime-need-visible | Storytime | Storytime videos need a visible stakes line before chronology begins. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H212 | *Forma textualis* var. h212-storytimes-retain-each | Storytime | Storytimes retain better when each scene has a text label showing progression. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H213 | *Forma actionalis* var. h213-final-lesson-increases | Storytime | A strong final lesson increases saves/follows more than a pure anecdotal ending. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H222 | *Forma formalis* var. h222-side-side-visuals | Comparison / review | Side-by-side visuals outperform sequential explanations when differences are visual. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H223 | *Forma pulsus* var. h223-carousel-style-complete | Motion graphic / carousel-style video | Carousel-style videos complete better when each slide resolves one micro-question. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H331 | *Forma formalis* var. h331-voice-clarity-matters | Audio | Voice clarity matters more than trend audio for educational videos. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H332 | *Forma formalis* var. h332-sound-effects-should | Audio | Sound effects should punctuate semantic beats, not every cut. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H364 | *Forma verticalis* var. h364-wrong-right-demonstrations | Fitness | Wrong/right demonstrations outperform correct-only form tutorials. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H365 | *Forma actionalis* var. h365-follow-along-workouts | Fitness | Follow-along workouts complete better when timers are visible. | FOL | M-FRM |
| H366 | *Forma probatoria* var. h366-fitness-transformations-need | Fitness | Fitness transformations need process proof to avoid feeling unrealistic. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H370 | *Forma commercialis* var. h370-transformation-visuals-outperform | Beauty / fashion | Transformation-first visuals outperform product-first intros. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H371 | *Forma actionalis* var. h371-case-framing-such | Beauty / fashion | Use-case framing such as workplace/date/night-out increases saves over generic styling. | SAV | M-FRM |
| H372 | *Forma textualis* var. h372-side-side-shade | Beauty / fashion | Side-by-side shade/fit labels reduce rewatch frustration and increase saves. | RET | M-FRM |
| H412 | *Forma formalis* var. h412-compare-within-topic | Cohort comparison | Compare videos within the same topic cluster, not across unrelated topics. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H415 | *Forma formalis* var. h415-tagging-frame-type | Creative genome | Tagging first-frame type reveals repeatable patterns that raw view counts hide. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H416 | *Forma formalis* var. h416-winner-mechanisms-useful | Creative genome | Winner mechanisms are more useful than winning topics. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H418 | *Forma storyformis* var. h418-scoring-below-threshold | Pre-post scoring | Videos scoring below threshold on first-frame clarity should be rebuilt before posting. | EHR | M-FRM |
| H419 | *Forma storyformis* var. h419-should-declare-primary | Pre-post scoring | A video should declare its primary action before scripting. | MIX | M-FRM |
| H426 | *Forma formalis* var. h426-repurposing-should-preserve | Repurposing | Repurposing should preserve the mechanism, not the exact edit. | MIX | M-FRM |
